actual_current_surface_status: bounded-support / FH-LSZ v2 target-response stability passed
exact_next_action: Keep accumulating v2 chunks and package completed outputs.  Any future response-window readout switch needs a separate predeclared acceptance gate plus scalar LSZ, FV/IR/model-class, and canonical-Higgs identity closure.

strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained y_t closure
does not replace the production response readout with a target window by fiat
does not set kappa_s = 1, cos(theta)=1, c2=1, or Z_match=1

verdict: The honest v2 multi-tau population has a stable positive-branch target-response surface across tau windows 0-9.  This narrows the response-window issue to the fitted response surface and the remaining physics gates.  It does not authorize replacing the production readout by fiat, and it does not supply scalar LSZ, FV/IR/model-class, or canonical-Higgs/source-overlap closure.
